title: Tetsu (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tetsu''' can refer to a number of things:

*[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''[[Tetsu (Sith)|Tetsu]]''' of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]]
*The '''[[Tetsu Clan]]''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] clan that included [[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]
*'''[[Tetsu (Sense Path)|Tetsu]]''' was a companion of a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual
*'''[[Karnak Tetsu]]''' was a [[Sorcerers of Tund/Legends|Sorcerer of Tund]]

{{Disambig}}
